top_signals.title: Iran War Spurs Extreme Bear Scenarios for Asia Currencies, Bonds
top_signals.summary: The Iran war is piling pressure on emerging Asian markets, pushing some currencies and bond yields toward levels once considered unlikely.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: SpaceX IPO Requires Leap of Faith in AI, Mars and Musk’s Vision
top_signals.summary: Elon Musk’s SpaceX pulled back the curtain on a business empire that has racked up ballooning losses and debt after acquiring a cash-hungry startup, and pumping billions of dollars into futuristic endeavors ranging from AI to a Mars rocket.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Samsung Electronics shares rally 6% after union suspends strike following tentative wage deal
top_signals.summary: Another round of negotiations led by South Korea's minister for labor and employment Kim Young-hoon resulted in a tentative agreement.
